question: Based on the chart, which statement about rainfall (mm) over this 14‑day period is most accurate?

options.A: Rainfall was greater during the first 7 days of the period than during the last 7 days.
options.B: Rainfall was greater during the last 7 days of the period than during the first 7 days.
options.C: The total rainfall in the first 7 days was exactly the same as in the last 7 days.
options.D: The chart does not provide enough information to compare rainfall between the first and last 7 days.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the first segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
